description: Built and launched FeedoZone from the ground up as a solo founder, independently managing every aspect of the startup from idea validation to execution.
responsibilities: Built and launched FeedoZone from ground up as a solo founder
Led end-to-end product development: strategy, design, development, and deployment
Managed vendor relationships, customer support, order management, and day-to-day operations
Drove marketing through digital campaigns, campus outreach, and social media
Conceptualized and improved the product based on customer and vendor feedback
Established onboarding pipelines for restaurants, delivery partners, and customers
Made strategic decisions to enhance customer experience and scale the business
